note: Fearful, broadly declining tape — trends fail. Exposure minimal (multiplier 0.15); cut to a near-full USDT reserve, hold at most one resilient leader tiny, and place a heartbeat trade to satisfy the daily-trade requirement while protective exits run. Every name is either in a downtrend (momentum_leg 0) or at blow-off vol from the sell-off.

computed.regime_reason: breadth_pct 33 <= 40 AND median_24h_return -3.2 < -2 AND fear_greed 24 <= 30 (fear) -> risk_off (broad decline; trends fail)
computed.risk_budget_reason: (100 - target_stable_reserve 12) * 0.15 = 13.2; no name pairs a valid uptrend with healthy vol, so the book is a near-full USDT reserve with one tiny resilient-leader heartbeat starter.

blend_scores.components: most resilient large-cap and realised vol 58 is healthy, but EMA stack falling + macd_hist<0 -> momentum_leg 0 -> blend_score 0
downtrend (momentum_leg 0) AND realised vol 96 ramping toward blow-off -> double demoted
steep downtrend (momentum_leg 0) AND realised vol 145 > ceiling 110 (blow-off) -> vol_quality 0

computed.blend_reason: No asset pairs a valid uptrend with healthy realised vol in a falling tape: every EMA stack is inverted (momentum_leg 0) and the survivors that hold vol are still down-trending. All blend_scores are 0. The Skill holds a near-full USDT reserve; a single tiny BTCB heartbeat trade keeps the agent daily-trade compliant while protective exits run.

entry: Do not initiate blend entries in risk_off (failed-trend regime); hold the USDT reserve.
If a daily heartbeat trade is required, place the smallest compliant clip in the single most resilient large-cap (highest base_score) and immediately bring exposure back to the reserve.
Per-name weight capped at 17%; min_stable_reserve floor 10% always honoured.
exit: Exit any inherited blend position whose blend_score < 0.50, whose trend breaks (close below EMA26 / negative MACD hist), or whose realised vol leaves the healthy band.
Force-exit at stop_loss 12% or take_profit 40%; on the risk_off transition rotate all risk into USDT.
Stay flat until breadth and momentum recover into risk_on/breakout with healthy vol.

actions.reason: risk_off transition + downtrend (momentum_leg 0) + vol ramping to blow-off -> rotate to USDT
smallest compliant daily-trade clip in the most resilient large-cap; satisfies min_trades_per_day 1 without taking real trend risk
